overview.founders: Division of MarketerHire; Chris Toy (CEO) leads

mission: To replace the traditional agency model with an AI-native marketing system that delivers enterprise-grade strategy at startup speed—growing sales, not headcount.
vision: To be the "growth operating system" for mid-market and venture-backed companies, eliminating the fragmentation and inefficiency of modern marketing through pre-built AI workflows and vetted expert talent.

value_proposition.summary: Enterprise-grade strategy executed at startup speed. MH-1 delivers:
points: **Battle-tested AI workflows** that 99.99% of marketers don't know exist
**Outcome-based approach** at a fraction of traditional vendor costs

products_services.name: Full-Stack Human + AI Marketing System
products_services.description: Month-to-month subscription combining AI-native specialists with proprietary automation workflows
products_services.target_customer: Founders, CMOs, VPs of Growth at mid-market and venture-backed companies

market_position.category: AI Marketing Services / AI Transformation Consulting
key_differentiators: Hybrid talent model via MarketerHire's Top 1% Verified Experts
market_position.notable_customers: Leverages MarketerHire's 6,000+ customer base as referral network

quick_facts: Positioned in the premium tier at $30k/mo — above low-cost tools ($99/mo) but below enterprise consultancies ($50k+)
Addresses the "adoption gap" where 78% of orgs use AI but <20% see EBIT impact
Competes on breadth (full-stack) vs. niche players like Avenue Z (GEO-focused)
"Cancel anytime" model is a key risk-reversal differentiator
Sales cycle estimated at 2-6 weeks due to flexible terms
